caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a room filled with framed pictures and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. He is speaking into a black professional microphone on a stand. In the initial sequence, he gestures with his right hand while speaking, then shifts to using both hands to gesture in front of him. He later leans back slightly, touching his chin with one hand before gesturing again with his right index finger. To his left, a logo featuring a red and black graphic with the text "ON THE" is visible, while "READY SET" is written in red text on the right. The background remains constant, showing a clothing rack and various wall decorations throughout the sequence.
